TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Liwkiw_ÁźČÁźÉ, title = Liwkiw_ÁźČÁźÉ, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Liwkiw_ÁźČÁźÉ} }

S.FORM: === Liwkiw binacadan ÁźČÁźÉśóŹ === Liwkiw binacadan(Liwkiw kamu:Liwkiw binacadan/„Éę„Éľ„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ „Éü„É≥„āļ„āĮ RŇęchŇę minzuku ?ÔľõDipun:Liwkiw binacadanÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku ?)u Liwkiw subal a binacadan, sakacaay nu nika udipan a kitidaan "Ukinawa, Sindaw subalan atu Yinmin subalan" nika kenihan, pala Ukinawa a tademaw, Sindaw a tademaw atu Yinmin a tademaw, nu aydaay nu Dipun a saka tusa nu satabakiay nu binacadan, ihakalay na tademaw saan tu nuhenian u Ukinawa han RŇęchŇę minzuku?Ôľõśó•Ť™ě:ÁźČÁźÉśįĎśóŹÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku?) . Liwkiw cundaw naw masacacayay a kanatal, alaen nu Dipun sisa mala Dipun, sisa micidek tu nilecuhan a "ukiwana a tademaw", " Sindaw a tademaw", "yenmin a tademaw", i imihan caay kaw malecaday ku idang atu lalangawan nu cudad a Liwkiw binacadan, sakamusa tu kitidaan, duma satu musakamu tu lalangawan, nina tusaay caay kaw malecaday. sisa, ayda ni kinsaan nu Dipun sa, inaya ku "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw binacadan " nipipulungan amisausi, pulung han amisausi u Dipun a binacadan, duma satu, i Ukinawaay a Dipung yadah ku tidaay, muenengay i tidaay a tademaw caay kaw nakamuwan u "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw a binacadan", sisa, aydaay a kawaw nai' ku tada malucekay atu misausi. ś≠§Ś§Ė, . itini likisi nakamuwan a Liwkiw binacadah tatengaay nika kenihan itini i Liwkiw cundaw (pulung nu aydaay a Ukinawa atu Luedaw nu Yenmin cundaw), idaw ku muenengay i Dipu a maudip, Taywan cundaw atu i nutawan a kanatalan mueneng. . Liwkiw binacadan tada kamu u Liwkiw a kamuan, ayda nu Liwkiw a binacadan maliyuh tu musakamu tu Liwki a kamuan, ayda kapulungan musakamu han u Dipun a kamuan atu Ukinawa nu Dipun a nakamuan. Liwkiw a tademaw u kamu nuheni nai' ku sakalecada a nakamuan, pasu Yemin a kamu, Ukinawa a kamu, aydaay a Kuyzen a kamu, Pacun-san a kamu, Kunku a kamu, atu Nakuo a kamu. . pulung han u Liwkiw a kumu han, milecad tunu Dipun a kamuan. . Liwkiw a kamuan cinglaw henay, situngusa a misulitay san u Aetay a kamuan, patucek tu Dipun a kamuan ku sapipulung, nika mikinkiway tu kamuan a tademaw idaw ku sasakamuen nuheni, saan Liwkiw a kamu atu Nandaw a kamu misengi sa. . Liwkiw yadah ku kenih nu kamu nuheni, u Ukinawa ku tatelungan nu malucekay a kamuan, nakamuan nuheni caay kalecad, tabaki ku caaya kaw masasulaliday a nakamuan. i Liwkiway a tademaw anu mapulung kuheni nu Dipun ku kamu nuheni, u Ukinawaay a tademaw katuu'd ku pahacengay nu ngalngal musakamu tu nu Dipun a nakamuan. ayda pinaa malebut ku misakamuay tunu Liwkiw a kamuan, u babalaki ku musakamuay, sisa Liwkiw a kamuan hamaw satu a malawpes, musakamuay tu Pacungsan a kamuan atu Nakuo a nakamuan, micidek tu samalawpes sa. Liwkiw cundaw i laad nu Cunkuo talu atu Dipun, Liwkiw kalalidan nu Cunkuo lalangawan atu Dipun a lalangawan, mala micidekay nu lalangawan. Liwkiw picidekan a lalangaw ÁźČÁźÉÁČĻśúČÁöĄśĖáŚĆĖ Liwkiw tademaw a bilanga nu lunem ÁźČÁźÉšļļÁöĄťĺúÁĒ≤ŚĘď itini i Liwkiw yadah ku milecaday tu Cuokuw atu Dipun a lalangawan. . sakamusa, picidekan nu Liwkiw a Ukinawa a liwli sa, atu epahepahan, inai' itini i Cuokuo atu Dipun. tulu ku tada lunem nu kakuan nuheni, u bilangaay a lunem, puohun a lunem atu masalumaay a lunem. bilangaaay a lunem itida i Cunkuo nutipan a Ce'-cin, Hu-cin, Kuen-tun, Puohu lunem han nu picidekan nu Liwkiw a lineman. itida i Liwkiw nu Wanciw a luneman u satabakiay nu kitakid a luneman. yu mahida sumamad u huncen han. mapatay satu ku tademaw, itidan i buhung ku kidu milahul, katukuh tu tuluay a mihcaan tayda ku tataynaan a lalumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw tamelac tu tadem hantu. milecad tu tawyaay nu Cunkuo nutipanay a ngayngayan nu tademaw sapuden ku ukak mitadem, tidaay a tademaw pangangan han tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitadem han, ayda idaw ku hulic nu nipatucekan, idawtu ku tatuduhan tu tademaw i Ukinawa sa lapesen tu, nutaw a kitakid idaw henay ku tademen ku ukakay, nai' tu maadih ku huncen hananay. .
S.PHON: === r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan *** === r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan(r~…ĺiwkiw kamu:r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan/***** **** ** ¶ńß* minzuku ?*dipun:r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan*********** *j*kj* minzoku ?)u r~…ĺiwkiw subar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan, saka ¶aaj nu nika udipan a kitidaan "ukinawa, sindaw subar~…ĺan atu jinmin subar~…ĺan" nika k…ônińßan, par~…ĺa ukinawa a tad…ômaw, sindaw a tad…ômaw atu jinmin a tad…ômaw, nu ajdaaj nu dipun a saka tusa nu satabakiaj nu bina ¶adan, ińßakar~…ĺaj na tad…ômaw saan tu nuńß…ônian u ukinawa ńßan ** ¶ńß* minzuku?***:*************** *j*kj* minzoku?) . r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw naw masa ¶a ¶ajaj a kanatar~…ĺ, ar~…ĺa…ôn nu dipun sisa mar~…ĺa dipun, sisa mi ¶id…ôk tu nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a "ukiwana a tad…ômaw", " sindaw a tad…ômaw", "j…ônmin a tad…ômaw", i imińßan ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku idaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu ¶udad a r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan, sakamusa tu kitidaan, duma satu musakamu tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, nina tusaaj ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj. sisa, ajda ni kinsaan nu dipun sa, inaja ku "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan " nipipur~…ĺuŇčan amisausi, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan amisausi u dipun a bina ¶adan, duma satu, i ukinawaaj a dipuŇč jadańß ku tidaaj, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tidaaj a tad…ômaw ¶aaj kaw nakamuwan u "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan", sisa, ajdaaj a kawaw nai Ē~ ° ku tada mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj atu misausi. **, . itini r~…ĺikisi nakamuwan a r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adańß tat…ôŇčaaj nika k…ônińßan itini i r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw (pur~…ĺuŇč nu ajdaaj a ukinawa atu r~…ĺu…ôdaw nu j…ônmin ¶undaw), idaw ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i dipu a maudip, tajwan ¶undaw atu i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺan mu…ôn…ôŇč. . r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan tada kamu u r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan, ajda nu r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺijuńß tu musakamu tu r~…ĺiwki a kamuan, ajda kapur~…ĺuŇčan musakamu ńßan u dipun a kamuan atu ukinawa nu dipun a nakamuan. r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw u kamu nuńß…ôni nai Ē~ ° ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ada a nakamuan, pasu j…ômin a kamu, ukinawa a kamu, ajdaaj a kujz…ôn a kamu, pa ¶un-san a kamu, kunku a kamu, atu nakuo a kamu. . pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan u r~…ĺiwkiw a kumu ńßan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tunu dipun a kamuan. . r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj, situŇčusa a misur~…ĺitaj san u a…ôtaj a kamuan, patu ¶…ôk tu dipun a kamuan ku sapipur~…ĺuŇč, nika mikinkiwaj tu kamuan a tad…ômaw idaw ku sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni, saan r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu atu nandaw a kamu mis…ôŇči sa. . r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku k…ônińß nu kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawa ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a kamuan, nakamuan nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, tabaki ku ¶aaja kaw masasur~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a nakamuan. i r~…ĺiwkiwaj a tad…ômaw anu mapur~…ĺuŇč kuńß…ôni nu dipun ku kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw katuu Ē~ °d ku pańßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ musakamu tu nu dipun a nakamuan. ajda pinaa mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku misakamuaj tunu r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan, u babar~…ĺaki ku musakamuaj, sisa r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ńßamaw satu a mar~…ĺawp…ôs, musakamuaj tu pa ¶uŇčsan a kamuan atu nakuo a nakamuan, mi ¶id…ôk tu samar~…ĺawp…ôs sa. r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw i r~…ĺaad nu ¶unkuo tar~…ĺu atu dipun, r~…ĺiwkiw kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan nu ¶unkuo r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. r~…ĺiwkiw pi ¶id…ôkan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ******* r~…ĺiwkiw tad…ômaw a bir~…ĺaŇča nu r~…ĺun…ôm ******* itini i r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ¶uokuw atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . sakamusa, pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a ukinawa a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺi sa, atu …ôpańß…ôpańßan, inai Ē~ ° itini i ¶uokuo atu dipun. tur~…ĺu ku tada r~…ĺun…ôm nu kakuan nuńß…ôni, u bir~…ĺaŇčaaj a r~…ĺun…ôm, puońßun a r~…ĺun…ôm atu masar~…ĺumaaj a r~…ĺun…ôm. bir~…ĺaŇčaaaj a r~…ĺun…ôm itida i ¶unkuo nutipan a ¶…ô Ē~ °- ¶in, ńßu- ¶in, ku…ôn-tun, puońßu r~…ĺun…ôm ńßan nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a r~…ĺin…ôman. itida i r~…ĺiwkiw nu wan ¶iw a r~…ĺun…ôman u satabakiaj nu kitakid a r~…ĺun…ôman. ju mańßida sumamad u ńßun ¶…ôn ńßan. mapataj satu ku tad…ômaw, itidan i buńßuŇč ku kidu mir~…ĺańßur~…ĺ, katukuńß tu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan tajda ku tatajnaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ tu tad…ôm ńßantu. mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tawjaaj nu ¶unkuo nutipanaj a ŇčajŇčajan nu tad…ômaw sapud…ôn ku ukak mitad…ôm, tidaaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitad…ôm ńßan, ajda idaw ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu nipatu ¶…ôkan, idawtu ku tatuduńßan tu tad…ômaw i ukinawa sa r~…ĺap…ôs…ôn tu, nutaw a kitakid idaw ńß…ônaj ku tad…ôm…ôn ku ukakaj, nai Ē~ ° tu maadińß ku ńßun ¶…ôn ńßananaj. .
S.FORM: === Liwkiw binacadan ÁźČÁźÉśóŹ === Liwkiw binacadan(Liwkiw kamu:Liwkiw binacadan/„Éę„Éľ„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ „Éü„É≥„āļ„āĮ RŇęchŇę minzuku ?ÔľõDipun:Liwkiw binacadanÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku ?)u Liwkiw subal a binacadan, sakacaay nu nika udipan a kitidaan "Ukinawa, Sindaw subalan atu Yinmin subalan" nika kenihan, pala Ukinawa a tademaw, Sindaw a tademaw atu Yinmin a tademaw, nu aydaay nu Dipun a saka tusa nu satabakiay nu binacadan, ihakalay na tademaw saan tu nuhenian u Ukinawa han RŇęchŇę minzuku?Ôľõśó•Ť™ě:ÁźČÁźÉśįĎśóŹÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku?) . Liwkiw cundaw naw masacacayay a kanatal, alaen nu Dipun sisa mala Dipun, sisa micidek tu nilecuhan a "ukiwana a tademaw", " Sindaw a tademaw", "yenmin a tademaw", i imihan caay kaw malecaday ku idang atu lalangawan nu cudad a Liwkiw binacadan, sakamusa tu kitidaan, duma satu musakamu tu lalangawan, nina tusaay caay kaw malecaday. sisa, ayda ni kinsaan nu Dipun sa, inaya ku "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw binacadan " nipipulungan amisausi, pulung han amisausi u Dipun a binacadan, duma satu, i Ukinawaay a Dipung yadah ku tidaay, muenengay i tidaay a tademaw caay kaw nakamuwan u "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw a binacadan", sisa, aydaay a kawaw nai' ku tada malucekay atu misausi. ś≠§Ś§Ė, . itini likisi nakamuwan a Liwkiw binacadah tatengaay nika kenihan itini i Liwkiw cundaw (pulung nu aydaay a Ukinawa atu Luedaw nu Yenmin cundaw), idaw ku muenengay i Dipu a maudip, Taywan cundaw atu i nutawan a kanatalan mueneng. . Liwkiw binacadan tada kamu u Liwkiw a kamuan, ayda nu Liwkiw a binacadan maliyuh tu musakamu tu Liwki a kamuan, ayda kapulungan musakamu han u Dipun a kamuan atu Ukinawa nu Dipun a nakamuan. Liwkiw a tademaw u kamu nuheni nai' ku sakalecada a nakamuan, pasu Yemin a kamu, Ukinawa a kamu, aydaay a Kuyzen a kamu, Pacun-san a kamu, Kunku a kamu, atu Nakuo a kamu. . pulung han u Liwkiw a kumu han, milecad tunu Dipun a kamuan. . Liwkiw a kamuan cinglaw henay, situngusa a misulitay san u Aetay a kamuan, patucek tu Dipun a kamuan ku sapipulung, nika mikinkiway tu kamuan a tademaw idaw ku sasakamuen nuheni, saan Liwkiw a kamu atu Nandaw a kamu misengi sa. . Liwkiw yadah ku kenih nu kamu nuheni, u Ukinawa ku tatelungan nu malucekay a kamuan, nakamuan nuheni caay kalecad, tabaki ku caaya kaw masasulaliday a nakamuan. i Liwkiway a tademaw anu mapulung kuheni nu Dipun ku kamu nuheni, u Ukinawaay a tademaw katuu'd ku pahacengay nu ngalngal musakamu tu nu Dipun a nakamuan. ayda pinaa malebut ku misakamuay tunu Liwkiw a kamuan, u babalaki ku musakamuay, sisa Liwkiw a kamuan hamaw satu a malawpes, musakamuay tu Pacungsan a kamuan atu Nakuo a nakamuan, micidek tu samalawpes sa. Liwkiw cundaw i laad nu Cunkuo talu atu Dipun, Liwkiw kalalidan nu Cunkuo lalangawan atu Dipun a lalangawan, mala micidekay nu lalangawan. Liwkiw picidekan a lalangaw ÁźČÁźÉÁČĻśúČÁöĄśĖáŚĆĖ Liwkiw tademaw a bilanga nu lunem ÁźČÁźÉšļļÁöĄťĺúÁĒ≤ŚĘď itini i Liwkiw yadah ku milecaday tu Cuokuw atu Dipun a lalangawan. . sakamusa, picidekan nu Liwkiw a Ukinawa a liwli sa, atu epahepahan, inai' itini i Cuokuo atu Dipun. tulu ku tada lunem nu kakuan nuheni, u bilangaay a lunem, puohun a lunem atu masalumaay a lunem. bilangaaay a lunem itida i Cunkuo nutipan a Ce'-cin, Hu-cin, Kuen-tun, Puohu lunem han nu picidekan nu Liwkiw a lineman. itida i Liwkiw nu Wanciw a luneman u satabakiay nu kitakid a luneman. yu mahida sumamad u huncen han. mapatay satu ku tademaw, itidan i buhung ku kidu milahul, katukuh tu tuluay a mihcaan tayda ku tataynaan a lalumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw tamelac tu tadem hantu. milecad tu tawyaay nu Cunkuo nutipanay a ngayngayan nu tademaw sapuden ku ukak mitadem, tidaay a tademaw pangangan han tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitadem han, ayda idaw ku hulic nu nipatucekan, idawtu ku tatuduhan tu tademaw i Ukinawa sa lapesen tu, nutaw a kitakid idaw henay ku tademen ku ukakay, nai' tu maadih ku huncen hananay. .

ku "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan " nipipur~…ĺuŇčan amisausi, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan amisausi u dipun a bina ¶adan, duma satu, i ukinawaaj a dipuŇč jadańß ku tidaaj, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tidaaj a tad…ômaw ¶aaj kaw nakamuwan u "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan", sisa, ajdaaj a kawaw nai Ē~ ° ku tada mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj atu misausi. **, . itini r~…ĺikisi nakamuwan a r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adańß tat…ôŇčaaj nika k…ônińßan itini i r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw (pur~…ĺuŇč nu ajdaaj a ukinawa atu r~…ĺu…ôdaw nu j…ônmin ¶undaw), idaw ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i dipu a maudip, tajwan ¶undaw atu i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺan mu…ôn…ôŇč. . r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan tada kamu u r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan, ajda nu r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺijuńß tu musakamu tu r~…ĺiwki a kamuan, ajda kapur~…ĺuŇčan musakamu ńßan u dipun a kamuan atu ukinawa nu dipun a nakamuan. r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw u kamu nuńß…ôni nai Ē~ ° ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ada a nakamuan, pasu j…ômin a kamu, ukinawa a kamu, ajdaaj a kujz…ôn a kamu, pa ¶un-san a kamu, kunku a kamu, atu nakuo a kamu. . pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan u r~…ĺiwkiw a kumu ńßan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tunu dipun a kamuan. . r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj, situŇčusa a misur~…ĺitaj san u a…ôtaj a kamuan, patu ¶…ôk tu dipun a kamuan ku sapipur~…ĺuŇč, nika mikinkiwaj tu kamuan a tad…ômaw idaw ku sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni, saan r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu atu nandaw a kamu mis…ôŇči sa. . r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku k…ônińß nu kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawa ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a kamuan, nakamuan nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, tabaki ku ¶aaja kaw masasur~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a nakamuan. i r~…ĺiwkiwaj a tad…ômaw anu mapur~…ĺuŇč kuńß…ôni nu dipun ku kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw katuu Ē~ °d ku pańßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ musakamu tu nu dipun a nakamuan. ajda pinaa mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku misakamuaj tunu r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan, u babar~…ĺaki ku musakamuaj, sisa r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ńßamaw satu a mar~…ĺawp…ôs, musakamuaj tu pa ¶uŇčsan a kamuan atu nakuo a nakamuan, mi ¶id…ôk tu samar~…ĺawp…ôs sa. r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw i r~…ĺaad nu ¶unkuo tar~…ĺu atu dipun, r~…ĺiwkiw kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan nu ¶unkuo r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. r~…ĺiwkiw pi ¶id…ôkan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ******* r~…ĺiwkiw tad…ômaw a bir~…ĺaŇča nu r~…ĺun…ôm ******* itini i r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ¶uokuw atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . sakamusa, pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a ukinawa a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺi sa, atu …ôpańß…ôpańßan, inai Ē~ ° itini i ¶uokuo atu dipun. tur~…ĺu ku tada r~…ĺun…ôm nu kakuan nuńß…ôni, u bir~…ĺaŇčaaj a r~…ĺun…ôm, puońßun a r~…ĺun…ôm atu masar~…ĺumaaj a r~…ĺun…ôm. bir~…ĺaŇčaaaj a r~…ĺun…ôm itida i ¶unkuo nutipan a ¶…ô Ē~ °- ¶in, ńßu- ¶in, ku…ôn-tun, puońßu r~…ĺun…ôm ńßan nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a r~…ĺin…ôman. itida i r~…ĺiwkiw nu wan ¶iw a r~…ĺun…ôman u satabakiaj nu kitakid a r~…ĺun…ôman. ju mańßida sumamad u ńßun ¶…ôn ńßan. mapataj satu ku tad…ômaw, itidan i buńßuŇč ku kidu mir~…ĺańßur~…ĺ, katukuńß tu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan tajda ku tatajnaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ tu tad…ôm ńßantu. mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tawjaaj nu ¶unkuo nutipanaj a ŇčajŇčajan nu tad…ômaw sapud…ôn ku ukak mitad…ôm, tidaaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitad…ôm ńßan, ajda idaw ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu nipatu ¶…ôkan, idawtu ku tatuduńßan tu tad…ômaw i ukinawa sa r~…ĺap…ôs…ôn tu, nutaw a kitakid idaw ńß…ônaj ku tad…ôm…ôn ku ukakaj, nai Ē~ ° tu maadińß ku ńßun ¶…ôn ńßananaj. .
